channel.title: Scientists on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Scientists on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Aerial Phenomena Research Organization
item.description:
The Aerial Phenomena Research Organization (APRO) was a UFO research group founded in January 1952. Based in Tucson, Arizona after 1960, APRO emphasized scientific investigations and employed consulting scientists, including James E. McDonald and James Harder. J. Allen Hynek considered APRO and NICAP to be the two most reputable civilian UFO groups of their time. A portion of APRO’s membership later formed the Mutual UFO Network (MUFON) in 1969. APRO’s case files were transferred to the National UFO Historical Records Center in November 2023.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aerial_Phenomena_Research_Organization
